title: Profile
subtitle: Manage your personal information and account settings

personalData.title: Personal Data
personalData.description: Update your personal information and profile photo

fields.displayNamePlaceholder: How you want to be called

emailConfirmation.pendingChange: A confirmation email has been sent to {{email}}. Please check your inbox to complete the change.
emailConfirmation.emailUpdatedPending: Profile updated. Confirmation email sent to {{email}}.

password.title: Change Password
password.description: Keep your account secure with a strong password

validation.minLength: Password must be at least 8 characters

errors.too_short: Password must be at least 8 characters
errors.missing_uppercase: Must include at least one uppercase letter (A-Z)
errors.missing_lowercase: Must include at least one lowercase letter (a-z)
errors.missing_number: Must include at least one number (0-9)
errors.missing_special_char: Must include at least one special character (!@#$...)

accessToken.title: API Access Token
accessToken.description: Use this token to access the Evolution API. Keep it secure and don't share it.

interface.title: Interface Settings
interface.description: Personalize the appearance and behavior of the interface

fontSize.title: Font Size
fontSize.description: Adjust the size of the text in the panel based on your preference.

messageSignature.title: Personal Message Signature
messageSignature.description: Create a unique message signature to appear at the end of every message you send from any inbox.
messageSignature.label: Message Signature
messageSignature.placeholder: Insert your personal message signature here.

hotkeys.title: Hotkey to Send Messages
hotkeys.description: You can select a hotkey (Enter or Cmd/Ctrl+Enter) based on your writing preference.

enter.title: Enter (↵)
enter.description: Send messages by pressing the Enter key instead of clicking the send button.

cmdEnter.title: Cmd + Enter (⌘ + ↵)
cmdEnter.description: Press Cmd/Ctrl + Enter instead of clicking the send button.

notifications.title: Notification Preferences
notifications.description: Configure how you want to receive notifications

conditions.title: Conditions for Alerts
conditions.playWhenInactive: Play only when the tab is inactive
conditions.alertUnread: Alert if there are unread assigned conversations

twoFactor.title: Two-Factor Authentication
twoFactor.description: Add an extra layer of security to your account

setup.title: Enable Two-Factor Authentication
setup.description: Choose the authentication method and confirm your password to continue.

totp.title: Authenticator App
totp.description: Use an app like Google Authenticator or Authy

configure.title: Configure your Authenticator App
configure.description: Scan the QR code below with your authenticator app or enter the manual key.
configure.qrCodeError: If the problem persists, use the manual key below
configure.manualKeyDescription: Use this key if you can't scan the QR code

verify.title: Verify Configuration
verify.descriptionTotp: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app.
verify.descriptionEmail: Enter the 6-digit code sent to your email.

backupCodes.title: Backup Codes
backupCodes.description: Save these codes in a secure location. Each code can be used only once to login if you lose access to your device.
backupCodes.warning: These codes will not be shown again. Make sure to save them now!

disable.title: Disable Two-Factor Authentication
disable.description: Are you sure you want to disable? Your account will be less secure.
disable.warning: Removing two-factor authentication will make your account more vulnerable to unauthorized access.

notifications.emailCodeSent: Verification code sent to your email
notifications.emailCodeResent: New code sent to your email
notifications.emailCodeRateLimit: Please wait before requesting a new code

twoFactor.info: Two-factor authentication adds an extra layer of security by requiring an additional code in addition to your password when logging in.
twoFactor.setupIncompleteWarning: Your two-factor authentication backup codes were invalidated due to a security upgrade. Please set up two-factor authentication again to restore your recovery access.

photoUploader.fileSizeError: The image must be less than 5MB

dangerZone.title: Danger Zone
dangerZone.description: Irreversible actions that permanently affect your account

deleteAccount.title: Delete Account
deleteAccount.description: Delete your account and all associated data permanently. This action cannot be undone.
deleteAccount.confirmDescription: This action is irreversible and will permanently delete your account.
deleteAccount.permanentWarning: All your data, conversations and settings will be lost forever.
